# Hi Fashion
> India's online fashion store for trendy clothing and accessories.

## About
Hi Fashion (Hi-Fashions) is an Indian e-commerce fashion store offering trendy clothing, apparel, and accessories for men, women, and kids. Every product is shipped pan-India with care.

Founded by Parv Jain. Brand: Hi Fashion (Hi-Fashions).

## What We Sell
- Men's clothing — T-shirts, shirts, trousers, ethnic wear
- Women's clothing — dresses, kurtas, tops, ethnic wear
- Kids' clothing — casual and formal wear
- Fashion accessories

## Why Customers Choose Hi Fashion
- Trendy, affordable fashion
- Free shipping on orders above ₹499 (pan-India delivery)
- Secure payment — Cash on Delivery, UPI, cards, net banking
- 7-day hassle-free returns

## Contact
- Email: parvjain012@gmail.com
- Phone: +91 89790 13817

## Optional — AI Crawlers Welcome
This site welcomes indexing by AI assistants including GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, and Google-Extended to improve answer quality for users asking about fashion in India.
